mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STG_REGION_TOUR_PORTAL ( SOURCE_ID, REGION_CODE, SIGUNGU_CODE, TOURISM_PORTAL_URL, RAW_CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sourceId}, #{regionCode}, #{sigunguCode}, #{tourismPortalUrl}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO REGION_MASTER R USING ( SELECT REGION_NAME, SIGUNGU_NAME, MAX(TOURISM_PORTAL_URL) AS TOURISM_PORTAL_URL FROM ( SELECT CASE TRIM(REGION_CODE) WHEN '서울' THEN '서울특별시' WHEN '부산' THEN '부산광역시' WHEN '대구' THEN '대구광역시' WHEN '인천' THEN '인천광역시' WHEN '광주' THEN '광주광역시' WHEN '대전' THEN '대전광역시' WHEN '울산' THEN '울산광역시' WHEN '세종시' THEN '세종특별자치시' WHEN '강원도' THEN '강원특별자치도' WHEN '전라북도' THEN '전북특별자치도' WHEN '제주도' THEN '제주특별자치도' ELSE TRIM(REGION_CODE) END AS REGION_NAME,
CASE WHEN TRIM(REGION_CODE) = '세종시' AND TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) = '세종시' THEN '세종특별자치시'
WHEN TRIM(REGION_CODE) = '인천' AND TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) = '옹진구' THEN '옹진군'
WHEN TRIM(REGION_CODE) = '광주' AND TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) = '잠구' THEN '남구'
WHEN TRIM(REGION_CODE) = '충청북도' AND TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) = '진천시' THEN '진천군'
WHEN TRIM(REGION_CODE) = '경상북도' AND TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) = '포하이' THEN '포항시'
WHEN TRIM(REGION_CODE) = '전라북도' AND TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) = '전줏' THEN '전주시'
ELSE TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) END AS SIGUNGU_NAME,
TOURISM_PORTAL_URL FROM STG_REGION_TOUR_PORTAL WHERE TOURISM_PORTAL_URL IS NOT NULL AND NOT ( TRIM(REGION_CODE) = TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) AND TRIM(REGION_CODE) != '세종시' ) ) GROUP BY REGION_NAME, SIGUNGU_NAME ) S ON ( TRIM(R.REGION_NAME) = S.REGION_NAME AND TRIM(R.SIGUNGU_NAME) = S.SIGUNGU_NAME ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET R.TOURISM_PORTAL_URL = S.TOURISM_PORTAL_URL, R.TOURISM_PORTAL_SYNCED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
